chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 744 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case For orders on CMA No.7449/2021 (Restoration) 24.09.2024 Mr. Nisar Ahmed G. Abro, Deputy Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner. Similar was the case on the last date of hearing and the date prior to it, when this petition was dismissed for non-prosecution vide order dated 15.09.2021. In the circumstances at hand, the restoration application moved by the petitioner is dismissed in non-prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
